name: python3-sarge
title: python3-sarge
summary: library to interact with exteranl programs (Python 3)
description:
library to interact with exteranl programs (Python 3)
This package contains Sarge, a library which is intended to make your life
easier than using the subprocess module in Python’s standard library.
.
Sarge is, of course, short for sergeant – and like any good non-commissioned
officer, sarge works to issue commands on your behalf and to inform you about
the results of running those commands.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-sarge because library to interact with exteranl programs (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-sarge as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-sarge with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-sarge --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
